codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior blocker: the backend regression now guards against the actual contradiction condition and adds an explicit restart phase that proves current-timer and history stay aligned after stopping one running entry and starting the next.

summary: Pass: the reviewed fix corrects the Phase 4 contradiction assertion and adds Phase 5 restart-boundary proof, so VAL-REG-004 now explicitly checks that a restarted running timer cannot simultaneously appear as stopped in history.
